title: Comic Book Artist Portfolio
description: Redwriter Comics gives editors and publishers one professional place to review the artist's work and start a commission conversation.
constraints: Editors needed to review work quickly without digging through social posts or scattered files.
problem: The artist had impressive work scattered across social media. Without a professional hub, he was missing opportunities from editors and publishers who couldn't view his portfolio.
solution: Built a fast, clean portfolio site that lets the artwork lead. The galleries were organized around how editors actually review work, so sequential pages, covers, and character pieces are easy to scan and compare.
result: The site gives editors a clean way to review work, trust the professionalism, and reach out for commissions without asking for links or files first.
